prompt: Work with a knowledge graph about programming languages: 1) Create an entity 'Python' (type: language, observations: ['interpreted language', 'created by Guido van Rossum']). 2) Add two more observations to Python: 'supports type hints since 3.5' and 'has async/await syntax since 3.5'. 3) Open the Python entity and verify it now has all 4 observations. Report the complete list of observations.
